title: WIP - consolidate env handling into pkg/env
body:
Env-variable related code is scattered across several packages making it
hard to maintain and extend.  Consolidate the code into a new pkg/env
package.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body: Still want to move the env-parsing code into pkg/env but for now I want to throw CI at it.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). Note to self: since Valentin is off on vacation after today, I'll take this one and finish it up.
